name: proof-guided-cta-change-client
notes: The ordinary client request contains only an opaque candidate reference.
The local provider owns Playwright, local artifacts, signatures, and explicit consumer time.
The installed profile, requirement mapping, expected root, and finding prose are construction-time authority.
The experiment has no hosted-Riddle client or hosted configuration.
Browser egress is not allowlisted; a checked page may request redirects or subresources from other origins.
